name: Black Walnut Bars # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 2 cups sifted flour and 1 cup firmly packed brown sugar in a large bowl.
2. Cut in the butter until crumbs form.
3. Press into a well-greased 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1 inch jelly roll pan.
4. Bake in a 350 oven for 10 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and let cool slightly, about 10 minutes.
6. Turn the oven temperature to 375.
7. Beat eggs until light. Gradually beat in 2 cups firmly packed brown sugar, then vanilla.
8. Stir together 2 tablespoons flour, baking powder, and salt. Add to egg mixture along with nuts.
9. Spread over baked crust in pan.
10. Bake in a 375 oven for about 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
11. Cool in pan on rack.
12. Cut into 2 x 1 inch bars.
